stored_cycle_windows.note: Provisional stored timestamps; documented ventilation period requires timezone/event-log confirmation.
Provisional stored timestamps; documented ventilation period requires timezone/event-log confirmation.

manifest.timestamp_warning: Stored timestamps are provisional and are not independently confirmed as local window-opening times.

model_definitions.rolling_mean_3: mean of the latest 3 available observations up to t
model_definitions.ridge_autoregressive: ridge-linear direct model using radon-only lag and rolling features from observations at or before t

manifest.validation_rule: blocked chronological validation inside the training cycle only
manifest.scaling_status: No scaler or standardisation is applied; alpha therefore depends on the scale of the radon-derived features.
manifest.phase_assignment_rule: Existing phase_metrics use forecast-origin phase; target_phase_metrics use target timestamp phase and are primary for paper-ready evaluation.
manifest.quality_handling: quality_affected targets are excluded; near-zero radon values are retained; MAPE is not used
manifest.gap_handling: examples crossing missing timestamps or lag-window sampling gaps are excluded; no interpolation is performed

caution: Forecasts are unconditional on future occupant actions. Increased error at the onset of documented ventilation is expected and provides a reference for later intervention-aware physical modelling.

rapid_removal_diagnostics.predicted_threshold_time_note: Direct 1h/3h/6h forecasts are not a continuous or recursive trajectory, so threshold-crossing time is not identifiable from this output.
rapid_removal_diagnostics.interpretation: Failure to anticipate an unknown opening is not treated as a software defect.

intervention_response_audit.interpretation: pre-event forecasts are unconditional on future ventilation; adaptation rows occur after new rapid-removal measurements are available

leakage_audit.feature_rule: lag, difference and rolling features are constructed only from observations at or before forecast origin t
leakage_audit.ridge_training_rule: Ridge is fit only on the development cycle for each experiment; test cycle rows are not used for fitting or alpha selection.
leakage_audit.validation_rule: alpha selection uses blocked chronological validation inside the training cycle only
leakage_audit.preprocessing_rule: no scaler or standardisation is used; no test-cycle preprocessing is fitted
